Projects.title: Invervyou AI
desc: Intervyou is an AI-driven SaaS platform designed to bridge the gap between education and employment by providing realistic interview simulations. The platform features a Gen AI engine that analyzes user responses and CVs to provide hyper-personalized feedback and material recommendations.

Built to scale, the system incorporates a gesture analysis module and a secure token-based payment gateway integrated with Midtrans. It currently serves over 3,000 users and is supported by Google for Startups and NVIDIA Inception.
